title: Simply A Better Vanilla
description: This pack is inspired by the core elements of the game and its trailers, bringing a fresh vibe while staying true to the original style and color palette.
body:
✨ **Simply A Better Vanilla** was originally created by JBlock as a personal project, built entirely on the foundations of the game itself. The textures were carefully designed to remain faithful to the native style, while offering a look that is cleaner, smoother and more refined, enhancing the original experience without losing its essence. What makes this pack truly _unique_ is its focus on _simplicity_ and _authenticity_. JBlock developed every detail from scratch, inspired only by the game’s own base elements and aesthetics. Originally developed for personal use, JBlock later released it to the community as a polished texture pack. The result is a texture pack that feels familiar yet fresh, experimental yet faithful, and above all, a celebration of the beauty of simplicity within the game. --- ![SWAMP](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c3e995a5a99c82e9f487033f033b5747c8f37b7a_0.webp) ![FOREST](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f91b466874532cd8337e6100089814a806ae8daa_0.webp)
